title: Advantages of the DBMS Approach: A Data-Centric View
description: This flowchart illustrates the key advantages of using a Database Management System (DBMS) compared to traditional file-based data storage, showing how a centralized DBMS overcomes the limitations of the old approach to deliver superior data management.
relationships: File-Based System leads to problems of Redundancy, Inconsistency, and Isolation
DBMS is the solution that centralizes data management
Centralized DBMS enables all listed advantages which solve the corresponding problems of the file-based system
